description: Automated Outlook account login with recovery email verification. Agent-driven, no GUI needed.

agent_installation_flow.description: When user pastes this repo link, follow these steps:

steps.note: cloakbrowser[geoip] downloads ~206MB binary on first install

required_data.ask: Kirim daftar recovery email Gmail + app password. Format: email:app_password (satu per baris)
required_data.how_to_get: Buka https://myaccount.google.com/apppasswords → buat app password untuk Gmail yang dipake sebagai recovery email Outlook

required_data.ask: Kirim proxy URL (format: http://user:pass@host:port). Ketik 'skip' kalau mau tanpa proxy
Kirim daftar akun Outlook. Format: email@outlook.com|password (satu per baris)

steps.action: Run batch if single test passes

steps.template: ✅ {success}/{total} berhasil login. Results saved to results.json

cloakbrowser.description: Stealth Chromium — 57 C++ source-level patches. Drop-in Playwright replacement.

files.config.json: Runtime config (proxy, recovery emails) — create from config.json.example
files.accounts.txt: Account list (email|password per line) — create from accounts.txt.example

steps: If password field → enter password → done
If recovery required → match masked email from config.json
If no code → click 'Use your password' (dispatchEvent on leaf node)

key_discoveries.use_password_click: Regular click() fails. Must use dispatchEvent with MouseEvent on leaf node.
key_discoveries.passkey_bypass: Navigate directly to Outlook URL — cookies already set from password.
key_discoveries.send_code_required: Must click 'Send code' — code NOT sent automatically.
key_discoveries.recovery_matching: Masked email like 'na*****@gmail.com' can match multiple. Try each.
key_discoveries.code_timeout: If no code after 2 min, fall back to 'Use your password'.

known_issues.imap_code_timeout: Microsoft rate limits recovery emails. Fallback 'Use your password' works.
known_issues.login_slow: ~3 min per account (2 min IMAP poll + 1 min navigation).

optimization_ideas: Skip IMAP polling — always use 'Use your password' (saves 2 min/account)
Parallel processing with multiple CloakBrowser instances
